title: Valentine
original_title: คริต กะ จ๋า บ้าสุด...สุด
overview: A car crash on a bridge causes Keng and Prae a big trouble in their lives. When they regain consciousness, they realize that their souls have switched bodies. Things get even worse when both realize the unique problems of having a body of the opposite sex.

trailers.title: คริตกะจ๋า... บ้า สุด สุด! (Valentine)
